title: Wrong bit vector indexing with constant function

features.name: constant_function_in_bitvector_range_declaration
features.description: Code should include a bit vector declaration with size computed by a constant function, such as wire [a(f)-1:0] d where function a returns a constant integer

features.name: constant_function_in_bitvector_index_expression
features.description: Code should include a bit vector indexing expression where a constant function is used in the range calculation on both sides of an assignment, such as assign d = c[a(f)-1:0]

features.name: repeated_function_call_in_single_expression
features.description: Code should include the same constant function called multiple times within a single expression, such as c[a(f)-1:0] where a(f) appears twice
